title: I Became The Strongest In One Day
description: Nor Verner accidentally kills Dark Heavens Overlord Rodon and activates the System.
excerpt: A level 6 throws a rock and kills a level 890 overlord.

title: Home
description: After awakening, Nor returns home and discovers the changes in his body.

title: Ravenport
description: Nor reaches Ravenport and discovers he can see other people's status windows.
excerpt: After forty minutes of walking, Nor began to notice the signs that he was getting closer to the city.
